homepage.heroSubline: Transforming Portland homes with quality craftsmanship and unwavering dedication. ZURC Construction: Building the future, one project at a time.
homepage.aboutTitle: Crafting Portland's Future, One Space at a Time
aboutText: ZURC Construction started with a simple goal: to provide Portland homeowners with honest, reliable remodeling services. We saw a need for contractors who understood the unique challenges of Portland's climate and housing stock, from the moisture issues plaguing our Craftsman bungalows to the earthquake risks we face as a region. We're a local team, invested in this community.

Our approach is built on clear communication, meticulous planning, and unwavering attention to detail. We believe in transparency every step of the way, from initial consultation to final walkthrough. We use quality materials and proven techniques to ensure lasting results, standing behind our work with pride.

Portland is our home, and we're committed to giving back. We actively support local organizations and prioritize sustainable practices in our projects. We strive to minimize our environmental impact and contribute to a thriving, resilient Portland for generations to come.

valueProps.title: Local Expertise
valueProps.description: Deep understanding of Portland's unique building codes, climate, and architectural styles.

valueProps.title: Transparent Process
valueProps.description: Clear communication, detailed proposals, and no hidden costs.

valueProps.title: Quality Craftsmanship
valueProps.description: Skilled tradespeople, premium materials, and meticulous attention to detail.

valueProps.title: Sustainable Practices
valueProps.description: Eco-friendly materials and waste reduction strategies for a greener Portland.

homepage.ctaSubline: Contact ZURC Construction today for a free consultation and discover the possibilities.

services.name: Kitchen Remodeling
services.shortDescription: Transform your kitchen into the heart of your Portland home.
services.description:
The kitchen is more than just a place to cook; it's a gathering space, a creative hub, and the heart of your home. ZURC Construction specializes in transforming outdated or inefficient kitchens into beautiful, functional spaces that meet your specific needs. We handle every aspect of the remodel, from initial design and layout to cabinet installation, countertop fabrication, and appliance upgrades. Whether you're looking for a modern, minimalist design or a cozy, traditional feel, we'll work with you to create a kitchen that reflects your personal style and enhances your daily life.

Portland kitchens face unique challenges, from moisture damage to space constraints in older homes. We're experts at addressing these issues, using moisture-resistant materials and innovative design solutions to maximize space and create a durable, beautiful kitchen that will last for years. We also stay up-to-date on the latest trends and technologies, offering options like smart appliances, energy-efficient lighting, and custom storage solutions.

Our kitchen remodeling process is designed to be as seamless and stress-free as possible. We'll work closely with you to develop a detailed plan and budget, and we'll keep you informed every step of the way. We understand that kitchen remodels can be disruptive, so we strive to minimize downtime and complete the project as quickly and efficiently as possible. We're committed to delivering exceptional results that exceed your expectations.

faq.question: How long does a kitchen remodel typically take?
faq.answer: The timeline for a kitchen remodel can vary depending on the scope of the project, but most remodels take between 4-8 weeks. We'll provide you with a detailed timeline during the initial consultation.

faq.question: Do you handle the plumbing and electrical work?
faq.answer: Yes, we have licensed and experienced plumbers and electricians on our team who will handle all necessary plumbing and electrical work, ensuring that everything is up to code and functioning properly.

faq.question: Can you help me with the design of my new kitchen?
faq.answer: Absolutely! Our design team can help you create a kitchen that is both beautiful and functional. We'll work with you to select the right materials, colors, and layout to meet your needs and preferences.

services.name: Bathroom Remodeling
services.shortDescription: Create your dream bathroom retreat with ZURC Construction.
services.description:
Your bathroom should be a sanctuary, a place to unwind and recharge. ZURC Construction specializes in transforming outdated or cramped bathrooms into spa-like retreats that meet your needs and reflect your personal style. From simple updates to complete overhauls, we handle every aspect of the remodel, including plumbing, electrical, tiling, and fixture installation.

Portland bathrooms are particularly susceptible to moisture damage, given our climate. We use moisture-resistant materials and proven techniques to prevent mold and mildew growth, ensuring a healthy and durable bathroom that will last for years. We're also experts at maximizing space in small bathrooms, using innovative design solutions to create a functional and stylish space.

Whether you're dreaming of a luxurious soaking tub, a walk-in shower with custom tile work, or a modern vanity with ample storage, we can bring your vision to life. We'll work closely with you to develop a detailed plan and budget, and we'll keep you informed every step of the way. Our goal is to create a bathroom that not only looks beautiful but also enhances your daily life.

faq.question: What are some popular bathroom remodeling trends in Portland?
faq.answer: Some popular trends include walk-in showers, freestanding bathtubs, and incorporating natural elements like wood and stone. We can help you incorporate these trends into your bathroom remodel while staying true to your personal style.

faq.question: How can I maximize space in a small bathroom?
faq.answer: We can use several strategies to maximize space, such as installing a wall-mounted vanity, using a corner shower, and incorporating clever storage solutions.

faq.question: What type of ventilation is needed in a bathroom?
faq.answer: Proper ventilation is crucial to prevent moisture buildup and mold growth. We recommend installing a high-quality exhaust fan that vents to the outside.

services.name: Basement Remodeling
services.shortDescription: Unlock the hidden potential of your Portland basement.
services.description:
Don't let your basement be an underutilized space! ZURC Construction can transform your unfinished basement into a functional and inviting living area, adding valuable square footage to your Portland home. Whether you envision a home theater, a guest suite, a home office, or a playroom for the kids, we can bring your vision to life.

Basements in Portland often present unique challenges, including moisture issues and low ceilings. We're experts at addressing these challenges, using waterproofing techniques to prevent water damage and innovative design solutions to maximize space and create a comfortable living environment. We also ensure that your basement remodel meets all local building codes and safety regulations.

Our basement remodeling process includes everything from initial design and planning to framing, insulation, electrical, plumbing, and finishing. We'll work closely with you to create a space that meets your specific needs and budget, and we'll keep you informed every step of the way. We're committed to delivering exceptional results that will increase the value and enjoyment of your home.

faq.question: How do I address moisture issues in my basement?
faq.answer: We recommend installing a proper waterproofing system, including a sump pump and vapor barrier. We can also address any existing leaks or foundation cracks.

faq.question: What permits are required for a basement remodel?
faq.answer: Permit requirements vary depending on the scope of the project, but typically you'll need permits for electrical, plumbing, and structural work. We'll handle all necessary permit applications for you.

faq.question: How can I make my basement feel less like a basement?
faq.answer: We can use several strategies, such as installing larger windows, adding recessed lighting, and using light-colored paint and flooring.

services.name: Deck & Patio Construction
services.shortDescription: Extend your living space outdoors with a custom deck or patio.
services.description:
Take advantage of Portland's beautiful summers with a custom-designed deck or patio from ZURC Construction. We specialize in creating outdoor living spaces that are both functional and aesthetically pleasing, providing the perfect setting for relaxation, entertaining, and enjoying the natural beauty of the Pacific Northwest.

We offer a wide range of decking and patio materials, including wood, composite, and concrete, and we'll help you choose the materials that best suit your needs and budget. We also offer a variety of design options, from simple decks to elaborate outdoor kitchens and living areas. We can even incorporate features like fire pits, pergolas, and outdoor lighting to create a truly unique and inviting space.

Portland's climate can be tough on outdoor structures, so we use durable, weather-resistant materials and proven construction techniques to ensure that your deck or patio will last for years. We also ensure that your project meets all local building codes and safety regulations. Let us help you create the outdoor oasis of your dreams!

faq.question: What are the best decking materials for Portland's climate?
faq.answer: Composite decking is a popular choice because it's durable, low-maintenance, and resistant to moisture and rot. Wood decking is another option, but it requires regular maintenance to prevent damage from the elements.

faq.question: Do I need a permit to build a deck or patio?
faq.answer: Permit requirements vary depending on the size and scope of the project. We'll handle all necessary permit applications for you.

faq.question: How can I protect my deck or patio from the elements?
faq.answer: We recommend applying a sealant or stain to protect the wood from moisture and UV damage. You can also cover your outdoor furniture during the winter months to extend its lifespan.

services.name: Whole House Remodeling
services.shortDescription: Transform your entire home with a comprehensive remodel.
services.description:
Ready for a complete home makeover? ZURC Construction specializes in whole-house remodeling projects, transforming outdated or dysfunctional homes into modern, stylish, and functional living spaces. We handle every aspect of the remodel, from initial design and planning to demolition, construction, and finishing.

Whether you're looking to update your kitchen and bathrooms, add an addition, or completely reconfigure your floor plan, we can bring your vision to life. We'll work closely with you to develop a detailed plan and budget, and we'll keep you informed every step of the way. We understand that whole-house remodels can be disruptive, so we strive to minimize downtime and complete the project as quickly and efficiently as possible.

Portland homes often have unique architectural features and challenges. We're experts at working with older homes, preserving their character while updating them for modern living. We also ensure that your remodel meets all local building codes and safety regulations. Let us help you create the home of your dreams!

faq.question: How long does a whole-house remodel typically take?
faq.answer: The timeline for a whole-house remodel can vary significantly depending on the scope of the project, but most remodels take between 6-12 months. We'll provide you with a detailed timeline during the initial consultation.

faq.question: How much does a whole-house remodel cost?
faq.answer: The cost of a whole-house remodel depends on several factors, including the size of your home, the scope of the project, and the materials you choose. We'll provide you with a detailed estimate after the initial consultation.

faq.question: How do I prepare for a whole-house remodel?
faq.answer: We recommend decluttering your home, packing up your belongings, and finding temporary housing during the remodel. We'll work with you to minimize disruption and make the process as smooth as possible.

services.name: Exterior Remodeling
services.shortDescription: Boost curb appeal and protect your investment with exterior remodeling services.
services.description:
Your home's exterior is the first impression it makes, and it also plays a crucial role in protecting your investment from the elements. ZURC Construction offers a wide range of exterior remodeling services, including siding replacement, window and door installation, roofing repairs, and painting. We use high-quality materials and proven techniques to enhance the beauty, durability, and energy efficiency of your home.

Portland's wet climate can be particularly hard on home exteriors. We're experts at addressing the challenges of moisture damage, rot, and mildew growth. We use weather-resistant materials and proper installation techniques to ensure that your home's exterior will withstand the elements for years to come. We also offer energy-efficient windows and doors that can help you save money on your energy bills.

Whether you're looking to update your home's appearance, improve its energy efficiency, or protect it from the elements, we can help. We'll work closely with you to develop a detailed plan and budget, and we'll keep you informed every step of the way. Let us help you create a home exterior that you'll be proud of!

faq.question: What are the best siding materials for Portland's climate?
faq.answer: Fiber cement siding is a popular choice because it's durable, low-maintenance, and resistant to moisture and rot. Wood siding is another option, but it requires regular painting and maintenance to prevent damage from the elements.

faq.question: How often should I replace my windows?
faq.answer: Most windows last for 15-20 years. If your windows are drafty, damaged, or difficult to open and close, it may be time to replace them.

faq.question: How can I improve my home's energy efficiency?
faq.answer: Installing energy-efficient windows and doors, adding insulation, and sealing air leaks can significantly improve your home's energy efficiency.

serviceAreas.content:
ZURC CONSTRUCTION-GENERAL CONTRACTOR IN PORTLAND,OR is proud to offer comprehensive remodeling services to homeowners in Beaverton, Oregon. Known for its established neighborhoods and family-friendly atmosphere, Beaverton features a variety of home styles, particularly those built in the 1970s and 80s. Many of these homes are classic suburban ranch styles, perfect for modern updates and renovations. We understand the unique needs of Beaverton homeowners and are equipped to handle any remodeling project, big or small. 

Our team is experienced in addressing the specific challenges that come with remodeling older homes in Beaverton, such as outdated plumbing, electrical systems, and energy inefficiency. We can help you transform your Beaverton home into a modern, comfortable, and energy-efficient space that meets your family's needs and reflects your personal style. We are also familiar with Beaverton's permitting processes and regulations, ensuring a smooth and hassle-free remodeling experience.

Beaverton's climate, with its mild, wet winters and persistent rain, can also impact your remodeling choices. We can advise you on materials and designs that are durable and weather-resistant, helping you protect your investment for years to come.
serviceAreas.localContext: Beaverton, Oregon, a city of approximately 100,000 residents, is characterized by its abundance of 1970s-80s suburban ranch homes and experiences mild, wet winters with persistent rain.

reviews.name: Sarah M.
reviews.text: ZURC Construction completely transformed our outdated kitchen. The team was professional, communicative, and the quality of the work is outstanding. We especially appreciated their attention to detail and commitment to staying on schedule. We highly recommend them!

reviews.name: John B.
reviews.text: We hired ZURC Construction to finish our basement, and we're very happy with the results. They were able to address the moisture issues and create a functional and comfortable living space. There were a few minor delays, but they communicated effectively and resolved the issues promptly.

reviews.name: Emily K.
reviews.text: ZURC Construction did an amazing job remodeling our master bathroom. They helped us design a beautiful and functional space that perfectly meets our needs. The crew was respectful, clean, and efficient. We couldn't be happier!

reviews.name: David L.
reviews.text: We hired ZURC Construction to build a new deck in our backyard, and we're thrilled with the results. The deck is beautiful, sturdy, and perfectly designed for entertaining. The team was professional, reliable, and easy to work with.

reviews.name: Jessica P.
reviews.text: ZURC Construction replaced the siding on our house, and it looks fantastic! They were able to match the original style of the house while using modern, durable materials. The project was completed on time and within budget. We would definitely use them again.

reviews.name: Michael S.
reviews.text: ZURC Construction managed our whole-house remodel with expertise and professionalism. They transformed our outdated home into a modern, functional, and beautiful living space. The team was responsive, communicative, and committed to delivering exceptional results. We highly recommend them for any remodeling project!
